com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.display

Interface ExtDisplay

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Module

    public interface ExtDisplay
extends Module
    [External Module] Provides the ability to display text and image on external device.

    How to get this module:

         ExtDisplay extDisplay = (ExtDisplay)ExtNSDKModuleManagerImpl.getInstance().getModule(ModuleType.EXT_DISPLAY);

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void backToHome()
      Returns to main menu.
      void clearScreen()
      Cleans the screen.
      void displayButtons(TitleParameters titleParameters, ButtonParameters[] buttons, int timeout, boolean isReturnHome, SelectionCallback callback)
      Displays buttons.
      void displayColorImage(byte[] imageData, boolean isBackground, DisplayColorImageParameters parameter, DisplayListener listener)
      Displays image using the specified image data.
      void displayColorImage(byte imageID, int timeout, DisplayColorImageParameters parameter)
      Displays the image that has been loaded to the external device via loadColorImage(byte, byte[], com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.display.DisplayListener) before.
      void displayImage(byte[] imageData, int x, int y, DisplayListener listener)
      Displays black-and-white image on external device.
      void displayImage(byte imageID, int x, int y)
      Displays loaded black-and-white image on external device.
      void displayMenu(int timeout, java.lang.String title, java.lang.String[] menus, SelectionCallback callback)
      Displays Menu Options.
      void displayQRImage(byte[] qrContent, DiaplayQRImageParameters parameter, DisplayListener listener)
      Displays QR Code of specified data.
      void displayText(java.lang.String[] messages, DisplayTextParameters param)
      Displays English text.
      void displayVersion(boolean isDisplay)
      Whether to display the version in the bottom or not.
      void displayView(DisplayConfiguration displayConfiguration, java.lang.String[] messages, PictureParameters[] pictures)
      Display custom view on Pin pad.
      void loadColorImage(byte imageID, byte[] imageData, DisplayListener listener)
      Loads color image into external device for displayColorImage(byte[], boolean, com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.display.DisplayColorImageParameters, com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.display.DisplayListener) to display image.
      void loadImage(byte imageID, byte[] imageData, DisplayListener listener)
      Loads black-and-white image into external device for displayImage(byte, int, int) to display image.
      void setAutoClearScreen(boolean isAuto)
      Sets whether or not to clean screen before displaying PIN/text automatically.
      void setReturnToHome(boolean isReturnHome, boolean enableCancelKey)
      Sets the configuration of return to home.
      void setUIMode(byte mode)
      Sets the UI mode used in the pinpad.

    • Method Detail

      • displayText

        void displayText(java.lang.String[] messages,
                 DisplayTextParameters param)
          throws NSDKException
        Displays English text.

        Example:

              try {
          String[] messages = new String[4];
          messages[0] = "line1";
          messages[2] = "line3";

          DisplayTextParameters textParameter = new DisplayTextParameters();
          textParameter.setAlignType(AlignType.CENTER);
          textParameter.setFontColor(0);
          textParameter.setFontSize(FontSize.NORMAL);

          extDisplay.displayText(messages, textParameter);
      } catch (NSDKException e) {
          // Handle the error.
      }
        Parameters:
        messages - [Required] Messages to display. Each string of this parameter will be displayed on a single line in order. 4 lines supported now.
        param - [Required] Parameters for English text display. See DisplayTextParameters.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • displayImage

        void displayImage(byte imageID,
                  int x,
                  int y)
           throws NSDKException
        Displays loaded black-and-white image on external device.
        Parameters:
        imageID - [Required] Image ID. Value range: [1-250]. This image shall already be loaded by loadImage(byte, byte[], com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.display.DisplayListener) first.
        x - [Required] Display X coordinate. Value range: [0-0xFFFF].
        y - [Required] Display Y coordinate. Value range: [0-0xFFFF].
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • displayImage

        void displayImage(byte[] imageData,
                  int x,
                  int y,
                  DisplayListener listener)
           throws NSDKException
        Displays black-and-white image on external device.

        Example:

             DisplayListener displayListener = new DisplayListener() {
         @Override
         public void onError(int errorCode, String message) {
             // Do something when image display failed.
         }

         @Override
         public void onSuccess() {
             // Do something when image display successful.
         }
     };

     try {
         byte[] imageData = {0x42,0x4D, (byte) 0x96,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,
                 0x00,0x00,0x3E,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x28,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x16,0x00,
                 0x00,0x00,0x16,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x01,0x00,0x01,0x00,0x00,0x00,
                 0x00,0x00,0x58,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,
                 0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00, (byte) 0xFF,
                 (byte) 0xFF, (byte) 0xFF,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x01, (byte) 0xFF,
                 (byte) 0x80,0x00,0x01,0x00, (byte) 0x80,0x00,0x01,0x00,0x40,0x00,
                 0x02,0x00,0x40,0x00,0x02,0x00,0x40,0x00,0x04,0x00,0x40,0x00,0x04,
                 0x00,0x00,0x00,0x08,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x08,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,
                 0x00,0x00,0x08,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x02,0x01, (byte) 0xC0,0x00,0x02,
                 0x09,0x00,0x00,0x02,0x6E,0x00,0x00,0x02,0x70,0x00,0x00,0x02,0x40,
                 0x00,0x00,0x02,0x40,0x00,0x00,0x02,0x40,0x00,0x00,0x02,0x40,0x00,
                 0x00,0x02,0x40,0x00,0x00,0x02,0x40,0x00,0x00,0x01, (byte) 0x80,0x00,0x00};

         extDisplay.displayImage(imageData, 1, 1, displayListener);
     } catch (NSDKException e) {
         // Handle the error.
     }
        Parameters:
        imageData - [Required] Image to display on external device.
        x - [Required] Display X coordinate. Value range: [0-0xFFFF].
        y - [Required] Display Y coordinate. Value range: [0-0xFFFF].
        listener - [Required] Listens to the image display result. See DisplayListener.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • loadImage

        void loadImage(byte imageID,
               byte[] imageData,
               DisplayListener listener)
        throws NSDKException
        Loads black-and-white image into external device for displayImage(byte, int, int) to display image.

        Example:

             DisplayListener displayListener = new DisplayListener() {
         @Override
         public void onError(int errorCode, String message) {
             // Do something when image loading failed.
         }

         @Override
         public void onSuccess() {
             // Do something when image loading successful.
         }
     };

     try {
         byte[] imageData = {0x42,0x4D, (byte) 0x96,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,
                 0x00,0x00,0x3E,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x28,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x16,0x00,
                 0x00,0x00,0x16,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x01,0x00,0x01,0x00,0x00,0x00,
                 0x00,0x00,0x58,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,
                 0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00, (byte) 0xFF,
                 (byte) 0xFF, (byte) 0xFF,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x01, (byte) 0xFF,
                 (byte) 0x80,0x00,0x01,0x00, (byte) 0x80,0x00,0x01,0x00,0x40,0x00,
                 0x02,0x00,0x40,0x00,0x02,0x00,0x40,0x00,0x04,0x00,0x40,0x00,0x04,
                 0x00,0x00,0x00,0x08,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x08,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,
                 0x00,0x00,0x08,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x02,0x01, (byte) 0xC0,0x00,0x02,
                 0x09,0x00,0x00,0x02,0x6E,0x00,0x00,0x02,0x70,0x00,0x00,0x02,0x40,
                 0x00,0x00,0x02,0x40,0x00,0x00,0x02,0x40,0x00,0x00,0x02,0x40,0x00,
                 0x00,0x02,0x40,0x00,0x00,0x02,0x40,0x00,0x00,0x01, (byte) 0x80,0x00,0x00};

         extDisplay.loadImage((byte) 1, imageData, displayListener);
     } catch (NSDKException e){
         // Handle the error.
     }
        Parameters:
        imageID - [Required] Image ID. Value range is [1-255].
        imageData - [Required] Image data to be loaded on external device.
        listener - [Required] Listens to the result of image loading. See DisplayListener.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • loadColorImage

        void loadColorImage(byte imageID,
                    byte[] imageData,
                    DisplayListener listener)
             throws NSDKException
        Loads color image into external device for displayColorImage(byte[], boolean, com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.display.DisplayColorImageParameters, com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.display.DisplayListener) to display image.
          Color image is supported on the following devices:
        • ME51P
        • SP100 with big screen

        Example:

             DisplayListener displayListener = new DisplayListener() {
         @Override
         public void onError(int errorCode, String message) {
             // Do something when image loading failed.
         }

         @Override
         public void onSuccess() {
             // Do something when image loading successful.
         }
     };

     AssetManager assetManager = context.getAssets();
     InputStream is = assetManager.open("newland_51.png");
     Bitmap bmp = BitmapFactory.decodeStream(is);
     ByteArrayOutputStream baos = new ByteArrayOutputStream();
     bmp.compress(Bitmap.CompressFormat.PNG, 100, baos);

     try {
         extDisplay.loadColorImage((byte) 1, baos.toByteArray(), displayImageListener);
     } catchv(NSDKException e){
         // Handle the error.
     }
        Parameters:
        imageID - [Required] Image ID. Value range is [0, 1].
        imageData - [Required] Image data to be loaded on external device. The image data length of each package shall be <= 2048.
        listener - [Required] Listens to the result of image loading. See DisplayListener.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • displayColorImage

        void displayColorImage(byte[] imageData,
                       boolean isBackground,
                       DisplayColorImageParameters parameter,
                       DisplayListener listener)
                throws NSDKException
        Displays image using the specified image data.
          Color image is supported on the following devices:
        • ME51P
        • SP100 with big screen

        Example:

             DisplayListener displayListener = new DisplayListener() {
         @Override
         public void onError(int errorCode, String message) {
             // Do something when image display failed.
         }

         @Override
         public void onSuccess() {
             // Do something when image display successful.
         }
     };

     try {
         AssetManager assetManager = context.getAssets();
         InputStream is = assetManager.open("scene_51.jpg");
         Bitmap bmp = BitmapFactory.decodeStream(is);
         ByteArrayOutputStream baos = new ByteArrayOutputStream();
         bmp.compress(Bitmap.CompressFormat.JPEG, 100, baos);

         DisplayColorImageParameters pictureParameter = new DisplayColorImageParameters();
         pictureParameter.setXCoordinate(0);
         pictureParameter.setYCoordinate(0);
         pictureParameter.setWidth(bmp.getWidth());
         pictureParameter.setHeight(bmp.getHeight());

         extDisplay.displayColorImage(baos.toByteArray(), false, pictureParameter, displayListener);
     } catch (NSDKException e) {
         // Handle the error.
     }
        Parameters:
        imageData - [Required] Image data.
        isBackground - [Required] Whether or not to set this image as background when width=320px and height=240px.
        parameter - [Required] Parameters for color image display. See DisplayColorImageParameters.
        listener - [Required] Listens to the image display result. See DisplayListener.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • displayColorImage

        void displayColorImage(byte imageID,
                       int timeout,
                       DisplayColorImageParameters parameter)
                throws NSDKException
        Displays the image that has been loaded to the external device via loadColorImage(byte, byte[], com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.display.DisplayListener) before.
          Color image is supported on the following devices:
        • ME51P
        • SP100 with big screen

        Example:

             try {
         AssetManager assetManager = context.getAssets();

         InputStream is = assetManager.open("newland_51.png");
         Bitmap bmp = BitmapFactory.decodeStream(is);

         DisplayColorImageParameters pictureParameter = new DisplayColorImageParameters();
         pictureParameter.setXCoordinate(0);
         pictureParameter.setYCoordinate(0);     *
         pictureParameter.setWidth(bmp.getWidth());     *
         pictureParameter.setHeight(bmp.getHeight());

         extDisplay.displayColorImage((byte)1, 5000, pictureParameter);
     } catch (NSDKException e) {
         // Handle the error.
     }
        Parameters:
        imageID - [Required] Image id. Value range: [0, 1].
        timeout - [Required] Duration time for color image display. Unit: ms.
        parameter - [Required] Parameters for color image display. See DisplayColorImageParameters.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • displayQRImage

        void displayQRImage(byte[] qrContent,
                    DiaplayQRImageParameters parameter,
                    DisplayListener listener)
             throws NSDKException
        Displays QR Code of specified data.

        Example:

             DisplayListener displayListener = new DisplayListener() {
         @Override
         public void onError(int errorCode, String message) {
             // Do something when image loading failed.
         }

         @Override
         public void onSuccess() {
             // Do something when image loading successful.
         }
     };

     try {
        byte[] textData = "test".getBytes();
        byte[] qrData = "This is QR code".getBytes();

        DisplayQRImageParameters qrImageParameter = new DiaplayQRImageParameters();
        qrImageParameter.setAutoCenter(false);
        qrImageParameter.setPosition(QRTextPosition.TOP);
        qrImageParameter.setXCoordinate((byte) 0);
        qrImageParameter.setYCoordinate((byte) 0);
        qrImageParameter.setTextData(textData);

        extDisplay.displayQRImage(qrData, qrImageParameter, displayListener);
    } catch (NSDKException e) {
        e.printStackTrace();
    }
        Parameters:
        qrContent - [Required] QR content data.
        parameter - [Required] Parameters for QR code display. SeeDiaplayQRImageParameters
        listener - [Required] Listens to the result of QR code display. See DisplayListener.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • displayMenu

        void displayMenu(int timeout,
                 java.lang.String title,
                 java.lang.String[] menus,
                 SelectionCallback callback)
          throws NSDKException
        Displays Menu Options.
        Parameters:
        timeout - [Required] The display timeout. Unit:s. Value range: >0.
        title - [Required] The menu title. Its title shall not be more than 32.
        menus - [Required] The menu options to be shown. The max option number is 12.
        callback - [Required] The callback to be invoked when error occurred or menu option selected.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • displayButtons

        void displayButtons(TitleParameters titleParameters,
                    ButtonParameters[] buttons,
                    int timeout,
                    boolean isReturnHome,
                    SelectionCallback callback)
             throws NSDKException
        Displays buttons.

        Note:The images of the buttons shall be loaded by displayColorImage(byte, int, DisplayColorImageParameters) first.

        Parameters:
        titleParameters - [Required] The parameters related to the title to be shown on the pinpad screen, details see TitleParameters.
        buttons - [Required] The parameters related to the buttons to be shown on the pinpad screen, details see ButtonParameters.
        timeout - [Required] The timeout of the display and selection procedure.
        isReturnHome - [Required] Whether to return home after the selection.
        callback - [Required] The callback of the selection, invoked when button selected, details see SelectionCallback.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • displayView

        void displayView(DisplayConfiguration displayConfiguration,
                 java.lang.String[] messages,
                 PictureParameters[] pictures)
          throws NSDKException
        Display custom view on Pin pad.
        Parameters:
        displayConfiguration - [Required] The display configuration, see DisplayConfiguration.
        messages - [Required] The messages to be displayed.
        pictures - [Required] The parameters of the pictures to be displayed. See PictureParameters.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • setAutoClearScreen

        void setAutoClearScreen(boolean isAuto)
                 throws NSDKException
        Sets whether or not to clean screen before displaying PIN/text automatically.
        Parameters:
        isAuto - [Required] Auto-clean flag.
        • 'true': It will clean screen first, then display PIN/text to the specified lines. In this case, the screen will only have the PIN/text displayed.
        • 'false': It will not clean screen before displaying PIN/text. In this case, the screen may still have some old information displayed with the PIN/text.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • clearScreen

        void clearScreen()
          throws NSDKException
        Cleans the screen.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • backToHome

        void backToHome()
         throws NSDKException
        Returns to main menu.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • setReturnToHome

        void setReturnToHome(boolean isReturnHome,
                     boolean enableCancelKey)
              throws NSDKException
        Sets the configuration of return to home.
        Parameters:
        isReturnHome - [Required] Whether returns to home after some operations.
        enableCancelKey - [Required] Whether enables "Cancel" key to return to home.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • setUIMode

        void setUIMode(byte mode)
        throws NSDKException
        Sets the UI mode used in the pinpad.
        Parameters:
        mode - [Required] The UI mode to be used. If bit7 is set to 1, it means using the custom UI afterwards.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • displayVersion

        void displayVersion(boolean isDisplay)
             throws NSDKException
        Whether to display the version in the bottom or not.
        Parameters:
        isDisplay - [Required] Whether to display the version in the bottom or not.
        Throws:
        NSDKException
